data.body:
- when you create a beat, instead of listing the profiles, it says something like "knots" (...).  just show the profile name.   we don't need to reveal knots as an underlying memory engine for foolery.
- in settings/defaults, the default profile's are weird.  they list something like "automatic" and "workflow".  again, just the profile names only, the underlying memory engine should not matter.
- when creating a new beat, the default workflow profile does not seem to be honored.
- the Profile selection in create new, and the profile selection in settiongs/default should both have a clickable info icon that pops a lightbox explaining the different profiles and what they mean to the user.
data.title: Workflow Profile consistency
